atomicity_rule: Each cycle produces exactly one full file. Multi-file intents must be queued across separate cycles.

open_trail.description: Opens a new PMCR-O trail record in .pmcro/trails/<trail_id>/meta.json.

inputs.subject_agent: Resolved subject agent key from registry.yaml.

open_trail.outputs: trail_id (UUID), trail meta.json written to disk.

close_trail.description: Seals the trail with a final disposition and updates .pmcro/trails/index.json.
close_trail.outputs: Updated meta.json with closed_at timestamp and final disposition.

preconditions: All phase frames must exist on disk

resolve_subject_agent.description: Reads registry.yaml and returns the skill path for the best-matching subject agent.

preconditions: registry.yaml must be present at S:/registry.yaml
safety.rollback: Return error — never guess an agent name.

dispatch_type1_action.description: Dispatches a TYPE1 (state-mutating) action after verifying HIL token.
dispatch_type1_action.outputs: Dispatch confirmation or HALT if token is missing.

preconditions: hil_token must be present and valid
action must be listed in type1_actions of subject domain_config
side_effects: Triggers physical file write or API mutation

write_earned_constraint.description: Writes an EarnedConstraint JSON to .pmcro/constraints/earned/ on HALT.

preconditions: Trail must be in HALT state
side_effects: Creates constraint file consumed by Planner on next cycle

routing_targets.closed: Seal Cycle Trail — write COMPLETE disposition
